expectations.text: The fetch step has a per-step ```config block with a `retry:` policy: `max: 5` and `backoff: exponential`
Includes a python script step (```python code block) for the JSON transform
Has a failure branch that routes to a `mail`-based notify step — either via a `fail` edge or a `fail:max` exhaustion handler
expectations.evidence: Lines 22-27 include `fetch -->|fail| notify`, `transform -->|fail| notify`, `upload -->|fail| notify`; notify step invokes `mail -s`

expectations.text: If `label max:N` appears on any edge, it's paired with a matching `label:max` handler edge (or retries are expressed via step-level config only)
expectations.evidence: No edge-level `max:N` used; retries are step-level only

expectations.text: Every node in the mermaid flow has a matching `## <id>` heading and vice versa
expectations.evidence: fetch, transform, upload, notify, done all present in both

expectations.text: `flags:` lists (if any) don't duplicate the agent's non-interactive switch (`-p`, `exec -`)
expectations.evidence: No `flags:` lists in this workflow (no agent steps)

expectations.text: No `local` or `global` keys nested inside a `RESULT` JSON
expectations.evidence: All RESULT objects contain only `edge` and `summary`
